Create a Blazor Web App for a university course catalog.

Requirements:
- Browse departments and courses in a searchable, filterable list
- View course detail pages (description, schedule, credits, instructor bio)

- Homepage shows featured courses and department links
- No authentication — open to all students and visitors
- Hosted on the university intranet with fast, reliable connectivity

data.content:
The Blazor Web App is ready. Here's a summary of what was created:

**Project:** `UniversityCourseCatalog/` — .NET Blazor Web App with Interactive Server rendering

**Structure:**
- **Models/** — `Department`, `Course`, `EnrollmentRequest` (with validation attributes)
- **Services/** — `CatalogService` (singleton, in-memory sample data with 5 departments and 10 courses)
- **Pages:**
  - `/` — Homepage with featured courses and department links
  - `/courses` — Searchable, filterable course list (real-time search by title/code/instructor + department filter)
  - `/courses/{id}` — Course detail (description, schedule, credits, instructor bio)
  - `/departments` — Department listing
  - `/departments/{id}` — Department detail with its courses
  - `/enroll` — Standard HTML enrollment form (name, student ID, course dropdown) with server-side validation

Run with `dotnet run` from the project directory.
